parserNotes: Found 6 transactions — all 6 in savings-0000. Checking account (0071) had zero transactions this cycle — completely inactive. Loan 0081 payment of $1,345.25 on 02/16 exactly matches the credit card balance on the January statement ($1,345.25) — another full credit card payoff. Credit card balance now $781.69 (new charges since payoff). Payroll stabilized at $1,290.94 per deposit (two deposits = $2,581.88). Savings growing strongly: $5,855.28 → $6,192.56. Transfer to Share 0070 ($400) and to Share 0000 ($500) on 02/16 — the Share 0000 self-transfer is flagged as potentially a labeling oddity. Dividends YTD 2026: $1.21.
